summary: Hunter Strength System v4 backend tests — 15/15 passed. Verified beginner-tier achievement expansion: 116 achievements across 5 tiers (beginner=25, basic=50, medium=100, major=250, elite=500 XP). All v4 features working: beginner auto-unlocks (squat_60/bench_40/deadlift_60/bench_bw_05/deadlift_bw_1/rank_e), strong-profile bodyweight ladder (bench_bw_15/squat_bw_2/deadlift_bw_25/deadlift_bw_3), first-session per day_type (first_squat/bench/deadlift), first_week (+300 XP bonus) and first_deload (+200 XP bonus), progression achievements via boss-fight (gain_lift_5/10 and gain_total_20/50 — starting_* correctly NOT reset on boss-fight), rank-chain auto-unlock for lower ranks. Regression: dashboard, workouts list/detail, progress, cardio (run), 404 for invalid IDs, AI coach (Claude Sonnet 4.5) all OK. Old removed keys (squat_specialist/bench_technician/deadlift_monster) confirmed absent.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1246 lines — consider splitting (achievements catalog, workout block generator, routes) into separate modules for maintainability.
ACHIEVEMENTS uses a flat dict with duplicated threshold logic in check_achievements() — could be data-driven for easier extension.
_last_cardio_activity is stored on the profile doc with a leading underscore but not stripped from responses; cosmetic only.
seed_data_creation: Test profiles prefixed with TEST_ created in DB; not cleaned up but isolated by random UUIDs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v4 tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_hunter_v4.py. Use BASE_URL = EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Old v3 tests in test_hunter_v3.py reference removed keys (squat_specialist/bench_technician/deadlift_monster) and will fail — should be deprecated/removed.
